creator: lifanov@mail.lifanov.com
text:
Created attachment 149014
games/tome4 1.2.4 -> 1.2.5

Please update games/tome4 to 1.2.5.
This is a bugfix release with highlights: game boots faster offline and addons can now be auto-updated.

Changelog: http://te4.org/blogs/darkgod/2014/11/tales-majeyal-125-aka-back-and-back-and-back-future-released

This diff also clarifies how to install per-user addons in pkg-message.

I'm about to attach a testport log too.
